---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a workflow improvement for the local worldbuilding tool
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Workflow Need

What worldbuilding workflow would this improve?

## Current Workaround

How do you handle this today?

## Proposed Behavior

What should the app do?

## Scope Check

Does this require any of the current non-goals?

- Account system: yes/no
- Cloud sync or hosted database: yes/no
- Collaboration or sharing: yes/no
- Telemetry or analytics: yes/no
- Native mobile app: yes/no
- Localization: yes/no

## Data Impact

Would this change saved JSON, import/export behavior, recovery snapshots, or
schema migration expectations?
